name: Check antiSMASH Results
description: Polls the antiSMASH API for job status and, when complete, returns PKS domain predictions (AT substrate, KR stereochemistry), predicted polymer SMILES, and BGC region hits. Use wait=True to poll automatically until done.

inputs.name: job_id
inputs.description: The Job ID returned by submit_antismash (format: bacteria-xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx).

inputs.name: wait
inputs.description: If true, polls every 15 seconds until the job completes or timeout_seconds is reached. Default false.

inputs.name: timeout_seconds
inputs.description: Maximum seconds to wait when wait=true. Default 300 (5 minutes).

outputs.description: Dictionary with: status, visualization_url, domain_predictions (AT_substrate, AT_substrate_code, AT_confidence, KR_stereochemistry, KR_activity per domain), predicted_polymer (polymer name and SMILES), and pks_clusters (BGC region hits, populated only for constructs >=10 kb).

output.message: Job is still processing. Try again in 1-2 minutes.
